privileged_info_summary: The task is an Odoo Calendar editing task where the agent assumes the role of Grace Patel, CFO of Northbridge. The agent must locate and update the 'Investor Update Preparation' meeting event by adding Karen Lee (who holds the Legal Counsel position) as an attendee, setting the location to Board Room, adding a meeting agenda (minimum 20 characters), and configuring an email reminder. The pass threshold is 70 out of 100 points. All data (contacts, events, and company information) is synthetically generated for testing purposes and does not reference external data sources.
